name: Human
description: Versatile and adaptable, humans have no particular strengths or weaknesses.

name: Dwarf
description: Stalwart defenders with natural resistance, but less agile than other races.

name: Elf
description: Swift and graceful, elves excel at magic and precision strikes.

name: Orc
description: Savage and powerful, orcs deal tremendous damage but lack finesse.

name: Halfling
description: Small but cunning, halflings excel at avoiding danger.
